image_assets.alt_text: Exterior view of the Rantoul Historical Society & Museum building.
image_assets.description: Main exterior of the museum featuring the brick building and arched entryway.

image_assets.alt_text: A museum exhibit of a 19th-century classroom featuring wooden desks, a mannequin teacher, and a chalkboard.
image_assets.description: Recreation of a rural Illinois one-room schoolhouse.

image_assets.alt_text: A white ceramic mug with the Chanute logo and text: End of an Era, 1917-1993.
image_assets.description: Chanute AFB commemorative mug marking the base closure.

image_assets.alt_text: A railroad history display featuring an I.C.R.R. sign and a conductor mannequin.
image_assets.description: Railroad history display with I.C.R.R. signage and conductor artifacts.

image_assets.alt_text: A museum wall of historical photos with vintage horse-drawn plows in the foreground.
image_assets.description: Vintage horse-drawn plows and local history photographic wall.

image_assets.alt_text: A vintage Sandy mechanical horse ride in front of a museum counter.
image_assets.description: Vintage Sandy the mechanical horse grocery store ride.

image_assets.alt_text: A glass display case containing several antique wooden wall-mounted telephones.
image_assets.description: Antique wooden wall-mounted telephones with hand-crank magnetos.

image_assets.alt_text: A museum display of a vintage print shop featuring a cast iron potbelly stove.
image_assets.description: Vintage print shop exhibit with a potbelly stove, evoking early Rantoul commercial life.
